ValidationRule.description: Restricts users from moving off the 'Documentation' stage until 100% Lease Documentation Approval has been reached for all Assets In Deal
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c), "Documentation"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Documentation")), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "ADM Approval"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "LOI"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "LOI in works"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "IC Approval"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Termsheet Signed"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Mandated"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Termsheet Sent"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Termsheet Drafting"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "CCO Sign Off"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Novation - ADM Approval"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Pipeline"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "LOI Signed"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "BAC Approval") ) ), pro_Full_Documentation_Approval_Achieved__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All Assets in Deal must reach 100% approval for lease documentation before the Deal Status can move off Documentation.
